introSection: Défi du Dragon is a steel roller coaster located at Jardin d'Acclimatation in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train features 8 rows with 2 riders per row for a total of 16 riders per train.

sections.title: Ride experience
sections.content: The ride starts with a drive tyre launch from the station. Halfway through the layout a turntable turns the train randomly left or right into a multi-pass drive tyre launch. This allows the train to be launched both forwards and backwards.

fullText:
Défi du Dragon is a steel roller coaster located at Jardin d'Acclimatation in Paris, Île-de-France, France.



The train features 8 rows with 2 riders per row for a total of 16 riders per train.

Red track with red supports.

The ride starts with a drive tyre launch from the station. Halfway through the layout a turntable turns the train randomly left or right into a multi-pass drive tyre launch. This allows the train to be launched both forwards and backwards.
